sn1.9:1.0.1: At Sāvatthī. Standing to one side, that devata recited this verse in the presence of the Blessed One:
sn1.9:1.0.2: v.15"There is no taming here for one fond of conceit,Nor is there sagehood for the unconcentrated:Though dwelling alone in the forest, heedless,One cannot cross beyond the realm of Death."
